login.title: Sign in
login.cardDescription: Use your work account to continue.
login.invalidError: The email or password is incorrect.

events.title: Events
events.description: Create, assign, and review attendance events from the admin workspace.

events.title: My events
events.description: Assigned active and upcoming events appear in this mobile workspace.
events.emptyDescription: Active and upcoming assignments will appear here.
events.errorDescription: Refresh the list or try again in a moment.

eventDetails.title: Event details
eventDetails.description: Review your assignment, planned rechecks, and required actions.
eventDetails.rechecksDescription: These recheck times were defined by the admin.
eventDetails.noRechecksDescription: This event does not have fixed recheck slots.
instructions: Arrive at the event location before checking in.
Keep location access enabled while you are attending.
Submit active rechecks from the app when they become available.
Check out before leaving if checkout is required.
eventDetails.errorTitle: Event details could not be loaded
eventDetails.errorDescription: Refresh the page or return to your events list.

checkIn.title: Check in
checkIn.description: Capture a fresh GPS location, review accuracy, and submit your attendance.
checkIn.emptyLocation: Capture your current location before reviewing GPS accuracy.
checkIn.rechecksDescription: These recheck times were defined by the admin.
checkIn.noRechecksDescription: This event does not have fixed recheck slots.
checkIn.detailsErrorTitle: Event details could not be loaded
checkIn.detailsErrorDescription: Refresh the page or return to your event details.

steps.locationDescription: Use your browser GPS with high accuracy enabled.
steps.reviewDescription: Confirm the captured coordinates, accuracy, and timestamp.
steps.photoDescription: Photo proof is only available after an upload provider is configured.
steps.submitDescription: Send this GPS proof to the secure check-in endpoint.

photo.notConfiguredOptional: Photo upload is not configured yet. This event does not require photo proof, so you can continue without it.

warnings.alreadyCheckedIn: This assignment is already checked in or is no longer eligible for check-in.
warnings.eventNotActive: Event is not active for check-in right now.
warnings.locationRequired: Capture your current location before submitting.
warnings.photoUploadNotConfigured: Photo upload is not configured yet.
warnings.poorAccuracy: GPS accuracy is poor. The backend may mark this proof as suspicious or reject it.

locationErrors.PERMISSION_DENIED: Location permission was denied. Allow location access in your browser and try again.
locationErrors.POSITION_UNAVAILABLE: Location is unavailable. Check GPS, Wi-Fi, or mobile location services and try again.
locationErrors.TIMEOUT: Location capture timed out. Move near a window or open area and try again.
locationErrors.UNSUPPORTED: This browser does not support geolocation.
locationErrors.UNKNOWN: Location could not be captured. Try again.

backendErrors.DEVICE_NOT_TRUSTED: This device is not trusted yet. Ask an admin to approve it before checking in.
backendErrors.EVENT_NOT_OPEN_FOR_CHECK_IN: Event is not active for check-in right now.
backendErrors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to check in.
backendErrors.UNAUTHORIZED: Sign in again before checking in.
backendErrors.VALIDATION_ERROR: The submitted check-in data was not accepted.

errors.deviceUnavailable: Device ID could not be prepared in this browser.
errors.missingLocationOrDevice: Location and device ID are required before check-in.
errors.unknownSubmitError: Check-in could not be submitted. Try again.

result.acceptedDescription: Attendance has started for this event.
result.rejectedDescription: The proof was recorded, but attendance did not start.
result.suspiciousDescription: Attendance has started, but this proof needs review.
result.title: Check-in submitted
